mapper.sql: id, drug_code, drug_name, common_name, category, unit, spec, manufacturer, approval_no, barcode, cost_price, retail_price, stock_min, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug_table (drug_code, drug_name, common_name, category, unit, spec, manufacturer, approval_no, barcode, cost_price, retail_price, stock_min, status) VALUES (#{drugCode}, #{drugName}, #{commonName}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{spec}, #{manufacturer}, #{approvalNo}, #{barcode}, #{costPrice}, #{retailPrice}, #{stockMin}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE drug_table SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM drug_table WHERE drug_code = #{drugCode} LIMIT 1
